2604.20560.title: LLM StructCore: Schema-Guided Reasoning Condensation and Deterministic Compilation
2604.20560.paper_summary: Automatically filling Case Report Forms (CRFs) from clinical notes is challenging due to noisy language, strict output contracts, and the high cost of false positives. We describe our CL4Health 2026 submission for Dyspnea CRF filling (134 items) using a contract-driven two-stage design grounded in Schema-Guided Reasoning (SGR). The key task property is extreme sparsity: the majority of fields are unknown, and official scoring penalizes both empty values and unsupported predictions. We shift from a single-step "LLM predicts 134 fields" approach to a decomposition where (i) Stage 1 produces a stable SGR-style JSON summary with exactly 9 domain keys, and (ii) Stage 2 is a fully deterministic, 0-LLM compiler that parses the Stage 1 summary, canonicalizes item names, normalizes predictions to the official controlled vocabulary, applies evidence-gated false-positive filters, and expands the output into the required 134-item format. On the dev80 split, the best teacher configuration achieves macro-F1 0.6543 (EN) and 0.6905 (IT); on the hidden test200, the submitted English variant scores 0.63 on Codabench. The pipeline is language-agnostic: Italian results match or exceed English with no language-specific engineering.
2604.20560.paper_summary_zh: 自動填寫病例報告表（CRF）來自臨床筆記的過程具有挑戰性，因為語言雜訊、嚴格的輸出契約以及假陽性帶來的高成本。我們描述了我們的 CL4Health 2026 提交，用於呼吸困難 CRF 填寫（134 項目），採用基於模式引導推理（SGR）的契約驅動兩階段設計。關鍵任務特性是極度稀疏：大多數欄位都是未知的，官方評分對空值和不支持的預測都會進行懲罰。我們從單步的「LLM 預測 134 欄位」方法轉變為一種分解，其中 (i) 第一階段生成一個穩定的 SGR 風格 JSON 摘要，恰好有 9 個領域鍵，(ii) 第二階段是一個完全確定性的 0-LLM 編譯器，解析第一階段摘要，標準化項目名稱，將預測正規化為官方控制詞彙，應用證據閘的假陽性過濾器，並將輸出擴展為所需的 134 項格式。在 dev80 分割中，最佳教師配置達到宏觀 F1 0.6543（英語）和 0.6905（意大利語）；在隱藏的 test200 中，提交的英語變體在 Codabench 上得分 0.63。該管道是語言無關的：意大利語結果與英語相匹配或超過，且沒有語言特定的工程。
2604.20560.author: Serhii Zabolotnii et.al.
